feed.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 (WH-TRWZ-E1) — firmware
feed.subtitle: Production firmware releases for SRAM WH-TRWZ-E1.

entry.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 (WH-TRWZ-E1) — firmware 1.5.2
entry.summary:
QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 WH-TRWZ-E1 — firmware 1.5.2

Part: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2

Address edge cases where reference pressure was unable to be changed under very specific circumstances

Released: 2025-09-11

entry.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 (WH-TRWZ-E1) — firmware 1.5.1
entry.summary:
QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 WH-TRWZ-E1 — firmware 1.5.1

Part: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store -Update to the “Shake to Wake” feature to bring up both ANT and BLE interfaces. -Sensor has been made to be more responsive to pressure changes.

Released: 2025-02-10

entry.title: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 (WH-TRWZ-E1) — firmware 1.1.1
entry.summary:
QUARQ TYREWIZ 2 WH-TRWZ-E1 — firmware 1.1.1

Part: QUARQ TYREWIZ 2

Initial Public Release

Released: 2023-09-21
